# GitHub Copilot Skills

This folder contains domain-specific Copilot skill guides and metadata for repository authors and contributors.

## Purpose

- Provide focused guidance for project categories such as web, backend, desktop, tools, docs, and shared libraries
- Help Copilot understand repository conventions and development patterns
- Link prompts and skill docs for consistent authoring

## Available Skills

- `01-web-development.md`
- `02-backend-development.md`
- `03-desktop-development.md`
- `04-tools-development.md`
- `05-documentation-development.md`
- `06-shared-development.md`

## Usage

Refer to the skill guides when writing new features, fixing bugs, or documenting architecture.

Use the prompts in `.github/prompts/` together with these skill docs to keep Copilot output consistent.
